widget.name: AxSignup Form
widget.description: Sign up form with full name, email, password, and SSO options

property.caption: Full name
property.description: Attribute to bind the full name field

property.caption: Email
property.description: Attribute to bind the email field

property.caption: Password
property.description: Attribute to bind the password field

property.caption: Show SSO buttons
property.description: Show Google and Microsoft SSO buttons

property.caption: On submit
property.description: Action to execute when the form is submitted

property.caption: On navigate to Sign In
property.description: Action when user clicks the Sign In link

property.caption: On Google SSO
property.description: Action when user clicks the Google SSO button

property.caption: On Microsoft SSO
property.description: Action when user clicks the Microsoft SSO button
